question: Address resolution protocol poisoning
canonical_answer: Type of cyber attack carried out over a Local Area Network (LAN) that involves sending malicious ARP packets to a default gateway on a LAN in order to change the pairings in its IP to MAC address table.

appears_in.title: Comptia Exam Objectives Security+
